ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the software product */,
  "release_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the release manager responsible for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the software product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_products_release_manager FOREIGN KEY ("release_manager") REFERENCES release_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software product */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the software version */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Total downloads for the version */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average user rating for the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Summary of changes made in this version */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Direct link for downloading the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version being downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user downloading the version */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was downloaded */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to the downloaded file */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who downloaded the version */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the download */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_downloads_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value (e.g., 0 to 5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user along with the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating was submitted anonymously */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the manager account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version associated with the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made in the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change is a major update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* The feedback text provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback was submitted anonymously */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the session is logged */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
